shortlist.name: Night in the ASCII Valley
shortlist.creator: Loopascii
shortlist.reason: The title and tags suggest a focus on retro aesthetics, specifically ASCII art. The description also supports this interpretation.

shortlist.name: Alone on the Shore
shortlist.creator: Loopascii
shortlist.tags: digitalart, glitch, black, pixel, sea, 1/1, lighthouse
shortlist.reason: The piece uses pixel art and the tag 'pixel' suggests a retro aesthetic. The glitch element adds to the databending category but is secondary to the overall retro style.

shortlist.name: Celestial Snail - 00
shortlist.creator: Neuromech
shortlist.tags: digitalart, ai, cosmic, celestial, ethereal, astral, snail, neuromech
shortlist.description:
This Celestial Snail, unremembering the past, unknowing its timeline and treating each day as a new start, glides slowly across a glowing cosmic plain, its shell spiralling like a miniature galaxy. Nebula dust clings to its trail, leaving behind a faint silver glow, as it charts a quiet path through the stars, mapping the universe one luminous step at a time.
〰️
Upscaled HD - 3840 x 4800 px. 
Post process digital modifications.
shortlist.reason: The description suggests the use of AI in creating a unique and conceptual piece that combines organic elements (snail) with cosmic imagery. The post-process digital modifications also indicate potential manipulation beyond basic rendering.

shortlist.name: The Art of Endurance.
shortlist.creator: Alex VA
shortlist.description:
When you look at it, you immediately understand: this girl has been through a lot of shit, but it hasn't broken her. Total chaos reigns around her, everything is crumbling, splashes of black and red paint resemble the debris and dirt life has heaped on her. She stands defenseless, completely open and vulnerable. But there's not a shred of self-pity in her posture or gaze.

Usually, after strong blows, people break down and withdraw into themselves. But here it's different. All those sharp black stripes in the background aren't just scars; they symbolize her experience. The red isn't blood from wounds; it's her inner anger and the energy that drives her forward.

"Pain fuels growth" that's her unspoken rule in life. Yes, she was in pain. But it was precisely this pain that made her who she is today: strong, confident, and devilishly beautiful in her strength.

Endurance isn't just about silently enduring blows. It's about standing tall even when the world is crumbling around you and everyone is trying to leave their dirty mark on you. She doesn't try to run from her problems. She embraced the struggle, digested all the darkness, and transformed it into her own personal masterpiece.
shortlist.reason: The description suggests a retro aesthetic with the mention of 'splashes of black and red paint' reminiscent of pixel art. The subject matter also aligns with the theme of vulnerability and resilience often found in narrative-driven pixel art.

shortlist.name: FIF4
shortlist.description: FIF4 deconstructs the visual language of football, exposing the tension between collective passion and the systems that shape it.
shortlist.reason: The title 'FIF4' suggests a connection to football and glitch art, which is supported by the description. The work deconstructs visual language of football, implying intentional distortion or manipulation.

shortlist.name: Flight into the Void
shortlist.creator: Palka
shortlist.tags: abstract, motiongraphics, conceptualart, glitchart, cryptoartist, animatedart, digitalsurrealism, loopingart, flightintothevoid
shortlist.description:
Flight into the Void is a mesmerizing motion piece that captures the ultimate journey toward the unknown. At the center of a vibrating, high-contrast digital landscape, a solitary silhouette stands poised against a surging horizon of neon emerald and burning orange.

As the sky pulses with digital energy, the ‘Void’—a mysterious black sun—remains the only point of absolute stillness, pulling the viewer into its depths. This animated loop is a poetic exploration of surrender and transcendence in a glitch-ridden reality. It represents the courage to leave the familiar behind and fly toward the infinite silence of the abyss."
shortlist.reason: The artwork's description mentions 'digital energy', 'neon emerald and burning orange', and a 'mysterious black sun'. These elements suggest the use of intentional distortion or visual noise, which aligns with Glitch Art & Databending.

shortlist.name: Combinatorial Play RGB
shortlist.creator: Xponential
shortlist.tags: seamless, loop, procedural, tiling, rgb, grid, opart, variety, trichromatic
shortlist.features: __availability_: primary, Loop: Seamless, Color: Trichromatic, System: Procedural
shortlist.description:
A 8x8 semi-procedural grid of arcs, diagonals, and waveforms in shifting alignments. Quarter circles, stripes, & squares meet with offsets that resist perfect symmetry, creating combinatorial play enclosed in 591kb.

The piece reads like a visual equation where strict geometry meets intuition, with repetition & inversion forming alignments within chaos, a balance between logic and surprise.

A 30 frame procedural motion study of a concept from a static design observed on pinterest. 

1080p-30frames-50fps-9colors-591kb

After Effects Source File (monochrome):
https://www.patreon.com/xponentialdesign/posts/combinatorial-138989384

RodeoClub archive (opensea):
https://opensea.io/item/base/0xd2997674dc355633c71640658cbe460ba8fa59a8/150
shortlist.reason: The piece is created through a procedural system and features geometric shapes, shifting alignments, and repetition, which aligns with the Generative Abstraction category.

shortlist.name: Beyond Silence
shortlist.creator: Neda Tavallaee
shortlist.description:
Hush—
Listen.
You can hear me whisper the promised freedom
in the song of saffron flowers.
shortlist.reason: The title and tags suggest an AI-generated work with a conceptual intention. The description also adds to the mystique, implying a deeper narrative.

shortlist.name: She Stayed With Me
shortlist.creator: Miduza
shortlist.tags: digitalart, melancholy, identity, aiart, conceptualart, surrealism, memory, innerworld, shadowself, selfreflection, thisliveswithinme
shortlist.description:
I no longer look back.

I know she is there.

Patient.
Silent.
Observant.

She is almost me.

From the collection:
This Lives Within Me
shortlist.reason: The title and tags suggest a deep conceptual exploration of identity, memory, self-reflection, and inner world. While not explicitly falling under the provided categories, the work's focus on these themes aligns with the spirit of conceptual art.

shortlist.name: When Flowers Grow Teeth
shortlist.creator: Art Pilgrim
shortlist.tags: digitalart, drawing, darkart, handdrawn, symbolism, flowers, organic, biomorphic, creature
shortlist.description:
When Flowers Grow Teeth explores the meeting point of beauty and danger. The flower is not armed by choice. Its teeth are as natural to it as petals, color, and fragrance. What appears threatening is simply another expression of its nature. Beautiful, dangerous, and completely at ease with what it is.

Hand-drawn digital artwork.
shortlist.reason: The description suggests a conceptual intention that explores the intersection of beauty and danger, which is not explicitly categorized under Generative Abstraction, Glitch Art & Databending, Retro Aesthetics, or Data Punk & Experimental AI. However, it does not appear to be decorative AI art without declared conceptual intention or polished digital illustration without procedural depth.

shortlist.name: 10000 things
shortlist.creator: Andrea Belloni
shortlist.description:
The 0 gives birth to the 1
The 1 gives birth to the 2
The 2 give birth to the 3
The 3 give birth to the 10000 things
shortlist.reason: The work utilizes GLSL shaders and ray marching techniques, demonstrating an abstract composition and a rule system originating the piece.

shortlist.name: Code_Bug 🐛🐛
shortlist.creator: El Uatu
shortlist.description:
This is based in a real piece of code of mine, used in stock market and written in Python. Some print remarks are in Portuguese.

Bugged also using Python.
shortlist.reason: The work is based on a real piece of code and uses Python as its medium, demonstrating an abstract composition derived from mathematical logic. The use of 'bug' in the title suggests intentional distortion or error, which aligns with Glitch Art & Databending, but the focus here seems to be more on the generative aspect.

shortlist.name: COUCHSURF
shortlist.creator: 𝙻𝙸𝙻𝙸𝙳𝚈𝚉  🍷
shortlist.reason: The NFT is tagged as 'generative' and 'ai', suggesting it might be created using algorithms. However, the 'gif' format and 'glitch' tag indicate a focus on intentional distortion and visual noise, which aligns with Glitch Art & Databending.

shortlist.name: 𝚆𝚊𝚟𝚎𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚖 𝙳𝚒𝚜𝚘𝚋𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚌𝚎
shortlist.creator: ::NONCEPTUALISM:: █░█▒█░█▒█░█
shortlist.tags: digital, code, motion, energy, system, pulse
shortlist.description: A line of illuminated squares cuts through a storm of digital turbulence, each one a pulse of ordered certainty inside a field collapsing into pure motion. Light bends, scatters, recoils. The piece feels like a transmission caught mid‑eruption—an energy system forgetting its architecture as it tries to speak.
shortlist.reason: The piece is created through an algorithmic system that generates a storm of digital turbulence and illuminated squares, demonstrating abstract composition and geometry.

shortlist.name: Ｄａｔａｆａｌｌ
shortlist.creator: ::NONCEPTUALISM:: █░█▒█░█▒█░█
shortlist.tags: abstract, code, data, technology, computer, horizon, scifiart
shortlist.description: A data‑horizon stretches into a cold synthetic dusk, its grid receding like a memory of physics. Above it, coded glyphs drift as if the sky itself is running a diagnostic. The whole field feels pre-sentient—an architecture waiting to wake, to rewrite the coordinates that once defined a world.
shortlist.reason: The description suggests an abstract representation of data and technology with a sci-fi theme, which aligns with Data Punk & Experimental AI. The use of coded glyphs and the pre-sentient feeling of the artwork also supports this.

shortlist.name: Slow Burn
shortlist.creator: Sinegor
shortlist.tags: pixelart, animation, nftart, skull, punk, transformation
shortlist.description: In each of us, a private apocalypse quietly unfolds. Rarely in a single moment. More often in small choices repeated until there is nothing left to save.
shortlist.reason: The pixel art style and animation tag suggest a retro aesthetic. The description also hints at a narrative that could be associated with the punk movement.

shortlist.name: C3N // WIREFRAME GLITCH ARCHIVES // NODE #1
shortlist.creator: C3SARIO Network (C3N)
shortlist.tags: tezos, objkt, generative, nft, surreal, architecture, cyberpunk, sacred geometry, glitch, futuristic, geometric, digital art, artifact, wireframe, cybernetic, sci-fi, monument, blueprint, archives, c3n
shortlist.features: __availability_: primary, Theme: Sacred Geometry, Collection: C3N // WIREFRAME GLITCH ARCHIVES, Node: #1, Style: Wireframe Glitch, Subject: Cybernetic Architecture, Palette: Emerald / Amber, Mood: Synthetic Monument, Network: C3N
shortlist.description:
NODE #1 expands the Wireframe Glitch Archives into the realm of impossible architecture. Sacred geometry, cybernetic engineering and corrupted signal interference merge into a monumental synthetic relic. Suspended between blueprint and machine, the structure exists as a recovered fragment from the C3N Network—an artifact where precision, distortion and digital memory converge.

Every NODE is a unique archive entry, documenting a different anomaly within the evolving C3N universe.
shortlist.reason: The work incorporates intentional glitches and distortions as its main aesthetic material, and it also references cyberpunk and futuristic themes.

shortlist.name: BACK TO THE FUTURE
shortlist.creator: flintpope
shortlist.tags: pixelart, glitch, dither, retro, sci-fi, lofi, mederu, mederu-atelier
shortlist.description: Although really this is a blast from the past combining the layout style I used to use on Rodeo with some of my more recent spheres and cubes. I have generated some of the material here with home-made apps. Please look at this responsibly and don't have any seizures y'all.
shortlist.reason: The NFT uses pixel art, a conscious nod to old technological limitations, and the description mentions a style used in the past, aligning with retro aesthetics.
